div1.entryFree: Teen, vexation, pain, grief: my face is full of shame, my heart of t. Ven. 808. or my affection put to the smallest t. Compl. 192. to think o'the t. that I have turned you to, Tp. I, 2, 64. of sighs, of groans, of sorrow and of t. LLL IV, 3, 164. each hour's joy wrecked with a week of t. R3 IV, 1, 97. I'll lay fourteen of my teeth, -- and yet, to my t. be it spoken, I have but four, Rom. I, 3, 13.
